home.title: Hi, I'm
home.subtitle: Frontend Engineer with 4+ years building scalable web applications, specialized in Vue.js and modern frontend architectures. Expert in Vue 2 → Vue 3 migrations, Composition API, Pinia and Screaming Architecture. I use AI tools to accelerate development and code optimization.
home.pitchTitle: Looking for someone for your next project?
home.pitchBody: I focus on building fast, accessible products with polished UX using Vue 3, React, TypeScript and scalable frontend architectures.
highlights: Frontend architecture based on Screaming Architecture
AI tools for code generation and optimization

ikusi.desc: Responsible for frontend development and architecture in enterprise web systems. Led migration from Vue 2 to Vue 3 using Composition API, Pinia and Vite. Designed project structure applying Screaming Architecture. Built reusable components with Vuetify 3 and managed version control via GitHub. Used AI tools to accelerate development. SCRUM methodology with Jira.

taag.desc: Web interface development using Vue 2 and Vuetify. REST API integration with Axios and AJAX. Implemented Vuex, Vue Router and i18n for multilanguage support. Mockup design in Figma and API testing with Postman.

tdm.desc: Web application development with Vue 2 and TypeScript. Backend services with Node.js, Express and node-postgres. Version control via Bitbucket with trunk-based development. Applied Clean Architecture and MVC pattern.

exos.desc: Responsive interface development with Quasar Framework (mobile-first). Form validation with Vuelidate and API consumption with Axios. Version control with GitHub and task management with Trello under SCRUM.

freelance.desc: Visual identity development, branding and logo design for independent clients. Creation of advertising materials using Figma and generative AI tools. Integration of visual design and technology to build modern, compelling brand identities.

p1.title: Vue 2 + TypeScript
p1.desc: Technical test project built with Vue 2 and TypeScript showcasing clean architecture and coding best practices.

p2.title: Pokemon Game
p2.desc: Interactive Pokemon game built with Vue 3, Composition API and PokéAPI integration.

p3.title: Veterinary Appointments
p3.desc: Veterinary appointment management app built with React, Hooks and LocalStorage.

p4.title: Expense Tracker
p4.desc: Budget and expense control app for personal financial management. Allows tracking income and expenses and visualizing the real-time balance. Built with React and Hooks.

p5.title: Gym Train
p5.desc: Web app for logging and tracking workout routines. Create sessions, record exercises, sets and reps to keep a detailed log of physical progress. Built with React.

contact.title: Contact
contact.successBody: Thanks for reaching out. I'll get back to you as soon as possible.
